title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | June 25, 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Add on every decline, even now
recommendations.detail: Caller holds BEL in 120% profit and asked whether to add. Kutumba Rao said one can add on every decline, even at current levels. He treated it as a stock to keep accumulating on dips.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies; not a stock to average
recommendations.detail: Caller is in 25% loss and asked about averaging. Kutumba Rao said Devyani should only be sold on rallies and is not a stock to average, since no significant gains will come until the company turns around (it trades around 100-plus / 130-plus). If you ask him, it is better to exit the counter on rallies.

recommendations.note: Hold, don't sell at current levels
recommendations.detail: Caller is in 20% loss, having bought near the all-time high (Avanti touched ~1,400 around April 15-20) and is now forming lower tops/lower bottoms. The West-Asia crisis pressures raw-material prices and this quarter may be weak. Kutumba Rao said don't sell at current levels, hold; the stock only enters a safe zone if it crosses 1,040-1,050.

recommendations.note: Hold; average only after Q results, not now
recommendations.detail: Caller holds 500 shares at average 650, now ~600, and asked about averaging. Kutumba Rao said don't average now but hold, since it already closed 600-plus recently after testing a low near 400 and is now forming higher top/higher bottom. Consider averaging only after this quarterly result, no need to rush.

recommendations.note: Recently active and strong in chemicals
recommendations.detail: Asked for a chemicals pick, Kutumba Rao said nothing looks that strong as most are in mid-course correction, but the one that recently gained activity and looks strong is Fairchem, which he would buy (Fairchem Organics).

recommendations.note: Opportunity; will also perform, may take time
recommendations.detail: In the same chemicals discussion Kutumba Rao added that there is an opportunity in Himadri Speciality too; even if it takes a little time, it will also perform.

recommendations.note: Hold all banks; matter of time
recommendations.detail: Caller is in 5% loss. Kutumba Rao said hold all banks, it's a matter of time; yields have fallen and the RBI Governor is behaving pro-market, especially for banks. Hold, no worry.
